title: onosma xanthotricha var. rubriflora
intro: Onosma xanthotricha var. rubriflora, also known as golden hairs onosma, is a plant species that belongs to the Apocynaceae family. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to stimulate the production of bile and improve digestion. The health benefits of Onosma xanthotricha var. rubriflora include its potential to treat digestive issues, such as constipation and indigestion, as well as its anti-inflammatory properties, which may help alleviate symptoms of arthritis and other inflammatory conditions. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in traditional medicine to make teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
